violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Store personal beverages below and away from work surfaces or food storage.--Food employee observed wearing jewelry on arms and/or hands during food preparation. Recommend staff removing watches/jewelry during service.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. Portion cup used for ready to eat snack mix. No handle.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed to reach in coolers/freezers.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Concessions stand #1 - Hot water not working at hand sinks.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need detail cleaning under equipment/shelving units.
Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
